subjects.name: Applied Probability and Statistics for AIML

notices.title: 4th Semester Mid-Term Examination Schedule
notices.content: The mid-term examination for B.Tech CSE (AIML) 4th-semester students starts on June 15, 2026. Hall tickets will be issued starting June 10, 2026. Ensure clear attendance dues (minimum 75% required) before that.
notices.author: Dean Academics

notices.title: Placement Intern On-Campus Recruitment Drive
notices.content: Sophomore internship opportunities by Google, TCS, and Wipro will initiate recruitment rounds on July 10, 2026. Minimum aggregate CGPA threshold is 8.0 with no active backlogs. Register at cutm.ac.in/placements before June 20, 2026.
notices.author: Placement Director

notices.title: Revised Applied Machine Learning Syllabus (CUTM1019)
notices.content: Module 3 has been updated by the board of studies to include hands-on LLMs and Gemini API integrations. Practicals will include building server-side AI agents.
notices.author: HoD CSE

notices.title: Syllabus Weightage and Attendance Regulations Rules
notices.content: Attendance regulations are strictly reviewed weekly. Students who fall below 75% will be blocked from semester-end theory and practical exam registration locks.
notices.author: Chief Warden

files.description: Complete subjects, credits structure, and passing standards for 4th Semester CSE (AI & ML).
files.extractedText:
B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering (AI & ML) - Semester 4 Credit Structure:
1. CUAI1002+ - Applied Probability and Statistics for AIML (4 Credits)
2. CUCS1003 - Design and Analysis of Algorithms (6 Credits)
3. CUCS1005 - Relational and Distributed Databases (3 Credits)
4. CUCS1013 - Android Development with Kotlin (6 Credits)
5. CUTM1019 - Machine Learning using Python (4 Credits)
6. CUTM1021 - Design Thinking (2 Credits)
7. CUVA4060 - Gender, Human Rights and Ethics (2 Credits)
Total credits: 27. Attendance requirement for exam entry is strictly 75%.

Grade,GradePoint,Description,PercentageRange
O,10,Outstanding,90% - 100%
E,9,Excellent,80% - 89%
A,8,Very Good,70% - 79%
B,7,Good,60% - 69%
C,6,Fair,50% - 59%
D,5,Pass,40% - 49%
F,0,Fail,<40%

files.extractedText:
Here is the complete extracted data from the **Academic Calendar: 2026-27** for the **School of Engineering and Technology (SoET)** at **Centurion University of Technology and Management, Odisha**.

---

# **Centurion University of Technology and Management, Odisha**
### **Academic Calendar: 2026-27**
**Program:** Under Graduate and Post Graduate  
**School:** School of Engineering and Technology (SoET)

---

## **1. ODD SEMESTER**
**Semesters:** $3^\text{rd}$, $5^\text{th}$, and $7^\text{th}$

| Sl. No. | Name of Activities | Schedule |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | Subject Depository to be sent to ERP | $1^\text{st}$ to $5^\text{th}$ June 2026 |
| 2 | Subject Registration | $10^\text{th}$ to $25^\text{th}$ June 2026 |
| 3 | Timetable Configuration and uploading of Session Plan in ERP | $1^\text{st}$ to $4^\text{th}$ July 2026 |
| 4 | Commencement of Classes | $6^\text{th}$ July 2026 |
| 5 | Mid Semester Examination | $7^\text{th}$ to $11^\text{th}$ September 2026 |
| 6 | Last Date of Instruction | $31^\text{st}$ October 2026 |
| 7 | Practical/ Project/ Thesis Examination | $4^\text{th}$ to $10^\text{th}$ November 2026 |
| 8 | End Semester Theory Examination | $12^\text{th}$ to $28^\text{th}$ November 2026 |

---

## **2. EVEN SEMESTER**
**Semesters:** $4^\text{th}$, $6^\text{th}$, and $8^\text{th}$

| Sl. No. | Name of Activities | Schedule |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | Subject Depository to be sent to ERP | $20^\text{th}$ to $25^\text{th}$ November 2026 |
| 2 | Subject Registration | $30^\text{th}$ Nov. to $2^\text{nd}$ Dec. 2026 |
| 3 | Timetable Configuration and uploading of Session Plan in ERP | $3^\text{rd}$ to $5^\text{th}$ December 2026 |
| 4 | Commencement of Classes | $7^\text{th}$ December 2026 |
| 5 | Mid Semester Examination | $27^\text{th}$ January to $2^\text{nd}$ February 2027 |
| 6 | Last Date of Instruction | $3^\text{rd}$ April 2027 |
| 7 | Practical/ Project/ Thesis Examination | $7^\text{th}$ to $13^\text{th}$ April 2027 |
| 8 | End Semester Theory Examination | $15^\text{th}$ to $30^\text{th}$ April 2027 |

> **Note for Lateral Entry students:** The commencement of class and Midterm exam will be notified later depending upon the last date of admission.

---

## **3. EVENT WINDOW**

| Sl. No. | Name of Event | Schedule |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | Inter/Intra University Sports | $30^\text{th}$ November to $5^\text{th}$ December 2026 |
| 2 | Indigenous Sports | $5^\text{th}$ to $6^\text{th}$ February 2027 |
| 3 | Gajajyoti, Bhubaneswar Campus | $10^\text{th}$ to $12^\text{th}$ February 2027 |
| 4 | Gajajyoti Paralakhemundi Campus | $18^\text{th}$ to $20^\text{th}$ February 2027 |
| 5 | Gajajyoti Chatrapur Campus | $24^\text{th}$ February 2027 |
| 6 | Gajajyoti Balasore Campus | $26^\text{th}$ to $27^\text{th}$ February 2027 |

> **\# Summer Internship Window:** $1^\text{st}$ May to $30^\text{th}$ June, 2027

---

**Signed by:**  
**Anita Patra**  
Registrar

scrapedUrls.title: CUTM Academic Calendar 2025-26
scrapedUrls.content: Centurion University Academic Session 2025-2026. Even Semester (4th Semester) runs from January 2026 to June 2026. Practical Examinations for Semester 4 occur between June 8th and June 14th, 2026. Registration for Semester 5 commences July 1st, 2026.
